paper.title: Networked Intelligence: Active Shared Context Graphs for Human-AI Team Science

release_search.conclusion: No author-owned code, data, protocol, context-graph, routing, prompt, trace, experiment, or study release was located as of acquisition. This is an acquisition-time search result, not proof that no release exists or will later appear. The paper embeds supplementary methods, one abridged baseline prompt, and a dataset description, but provides no repository or dataset URL; its phrase 'see released harness' is not accompanied by a locator.
release_search.paper_link_inspection: The complete PDF extraction, references, arXiv abstract metadata, and arXiv HTML were searched for release locators. URLs found were citations to external protocols, projects, documentation, and prior work; none identified a Mycelium implementation or campaign artifact release.

scope_note: This manifest establishes source acquisition and release-search provenance only. It does not constitute a deep review, validate the paper's scientific claims, or establish causal routing, tacit-knowledge transfer, utility, privacy, or readiness.
version_notice: The arXiv API identifies immutable version 2607.13220v1 and contains no withdrawal or retraction notice at acquisition. The PDF metadata reports 21 pages. Equations, figures, and table layout should be verified against PDF or arXiv HTML rather than relying solely on pdftotext output.
